questions.subject: Earth System & Geomorphology
questions.stem: The boundary between the crust and the mantle is the
questions.solution:
**Concept.** The Moho separates crust from mantle; Gutenberg = mantle–core; Lehmann = inner–outer core.

**Working.**
Moho.

**Answer.** Mohorovičić discontinuity

questions.subject: Earth System & Geomorphology
questions.stem: Linear magnetic stripes of alternating polarity, symmetric about a mid-ocean ridge, are direct evidence for
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Vine–Matthews: symmetric magnetic anomalies record sea-floor spreading.

**Working.**
Sea-floor spreading.

**Answer.** Sea-floor spreading

questions.subject: Earth System & Geomorphology
questions.stem: A meandering river deposits coarse sediment preferentially on the
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Velocity is lowest on the inner bend, so point bars accrete there; the outer bank erodes.

**Working.**
Point bar.

**Answer.** Point bar (inner bank)

questions.subject: Earth System & Geomorphology
questions.stem: Which landforms are characteristically glacial in origin?
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Cirque, drumlin and esker are glacial; a yardang is wind (aeolian) carved.

**Working.**
Cirque, drumlin, esker.

**Answer.** Glacial landforms

questions.subject: Earth System & Geomorphology
questions.stem: In the Airy model of isostasy, mountains are compensated by
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Airy: constant-density crust of variable thickness — high topography has a deep root.

**Working.**
Deep roots.

**Answer.** Deep low-density roots
